description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and sets the DOCKER_DRIVER variable to overlay. Define a single deploy stage containing a deploy_to_heroku job. In its before_script run `apk add git --update-cache --repository http://dl-3.alpinelinux.org/alpine/edge/testing/`, `apk add openssl --update-cache`, `wget -qO- https://github.com/git-lfs/git-lfs/releases/download/v2.1.1/git-lfs-linux-amd64-2.1.1.tar.gz | tar xz`, `mv git-lfs-*/git-lfs /usr/bin/ && rm -rf git-lfs-* && git lfs install && git lfs pull`. In the script execute `git lfs pull`, `docker login --username=_ --password=$HEROKU_AUTH_TOKEN registry.heroku.com`, `docker build -t registry.heroku.com/background-removal/web .`, `docker push registry.heroku.com/background-removal/web`, `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com`, `docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/fast-science/background-removal-server .`, and `docker push registry.gitlab.com/fast-science/background-removal-server`. The job runs on every pipeline without additional rules.
